sqlMap.insert: /*BcjisHisComm.insertTbDgroffice020H*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGROFFICE020_H( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , OFFICE_CD , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , OFFICE_RANK , OFFICE_RANK020 , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , OFFICE_CD , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_DGROFFICE020_H Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , OFFICE_RANK , OFFICE_RANK020 , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbDgrcompoH*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPO_H( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO_H Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbDgrcompofrscH*/ INSERT TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC_H( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , FRSC_FG_CD , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_FRSC_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , FRSC_FG_CD , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC_H Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_FRSC_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
AND FRSC_FG_CD = #frscFgCd#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbDgrcompocharH*/ INSERT TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR_H( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CHAR_FG_CD , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_CHAR_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CHAR_FG_CD , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR_H Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_CHAR_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
AND CHAR_FG_CD = #charFgCd#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReportH*/ INSERT TB_REPORT_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbSheetH*/ INSERT TB_SHEET_H( SHEET_CD , SHEET_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT SHEET_CD , SHEET_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_SHEET_H Z WHERE Z.SHEET_CD = A.SHEET_CD AND Z.SHEET_DETL_CD = A.SHEET_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_SHEET A WHERE 1 = 1 AND SHEET_CD = #sheetCd# AND SHEET_DETL_CD = #sheetDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbPledgeH*/ INSERT TB_PLEDGE_H( PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , EXAM_CONT , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_PLEDGE_H Z WHERE Z.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , EXAM_CONT , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_PLEDGE A WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport010H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT010_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , INVEST_PLAN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT010_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , INVEST_PLAN , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT010 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport020H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT020_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , INVEST_PLAN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , TOT_CHAR_AMT1 , TOT_CHAR_AMT2 , TOT_CHAR_AMT3 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5 , PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT1 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT2 , PRE_INV_CHAR_AMT3 , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , INVEST_PLAN , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT020 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport030H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT030_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , PRE_NATN_EXP , PRE_SI_EXP , GU_GOON_EXP , NATN_BIZ_NM , MNSTRY_NM , NATN_BUDN_RATE , SI_BUDN_RATE , GU_BUDN_RATE , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT030_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , PRE_NATN_EXP , PRE_SI_EXP , GU_GOON_EXP , NATN_BIZ_NM , MNSTRY_NM , NATN_BUDN_RATE , SI_BUDN_RATE , GU_BUDN_RATE , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT030 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND DEPT_CD = #deptCd# AND DBIZ_CD = #dbizCd#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport040H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT040_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , STAFF_CNT , STAFF_CURR_CNT , DRIVER_CNT , ETC_CNT , EXP_FG , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT040_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , STAFF_CNT , STAFF_CURR_CNT , DRIVER_CNT , ETC_CNT , EXP_FG , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT040 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport050H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT050_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT050_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT050 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport055H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT055_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , JUDG_RSLT_AMT , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT055_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , JUDG_RSLT_AMT , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT055 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport060H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT060_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT060_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT060 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport070H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT070_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , ORDER_YMD_SEQ , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , CONSIDER_AMT1 , CONSIDER_AMT2 , CONSIDER_AMT3 , CONSIDER_AMT4 , CONSIDER_AMT5 , CONSIDER_AMT6 , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , ORDER_YMD_SEQ , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT070_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , CONSIDER_AMT1 , CONSIDER_AMT2 , CONSIDER_AMT3 , CONSIDER_AMT4 , CONSIDER_AMT5 , CONSIDER_AMT6 , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT070 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport080H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT080_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , IMPORT_PERSON_NM , TOT_BIZ_AMT , PRE_BIZ_AMT , ADD_DEMAND_AMT , REFLECT_AMT , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT080_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , IMPORT_PERSON_NM , TOT_BIZ_AMT , PRE_BIZ_AMT , ADD_DEMAND_AMT , REFLECT_AMT , REPORT_SORT_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT080 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport090H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT090_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT090_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT090 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport0A0H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT0A0_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT0A0_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT0A0 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport0B0H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT0B0_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , BIZ_NM , BIZ_AMOUNT , BIZ_PERIOD , TOT_BIZ_AMT , PRE_BIZ_AMT , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT0B0_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , BIZ_NM , BIZ_AMOUNT , BIZ_PERIOD , TOT_BIZ_AMT , PRE_BIZ_AMT , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT0B0 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport0C0H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT0C0_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , BIZ_NM , DEMAND_TITLE , DEMAND_CONT , EXPLAIN_CONT , EXAM_CONT , TOT_FRSC_CONT , PRE_INV_FRSC_CONT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_CONT , PRE_FRSC_CONT , DMN_FRSC_CONT , FRSC_CONT , INVEST_PLAN0 , INVEST_PLAN1 , INVEST_PLAN2 , INVEST_PLAN6 , INVEST_PLAN_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REPORT_FG , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT0C0_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , BIZ_NM , DEMAND_TITLE , DEMAND_CONT , EXPLAIN_CONT , EXAM_CONT , TOT_FRSC_CONT , PRE_INV_FRSC_CONT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_CONT , PRE_FRSC_CONT , DMN_FRSC_CONT , FRSC_CONT , INVEST_PLAN0 , INVEST_PLAN1 , INVEST_PLAN2 , INVEST_PLAN6 , INVEST_PLAN_CONT , SRCH_VAL , REPORT_FG , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT0C0 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BcjisHisComm.insertTbReport0D0H*/ INSERT TB_REPORT0D0_H( REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT REPORT_CD , REPORT_DETL_CD , FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT0D0_H Z WHERE Z.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND Z.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REFLECT_FG , DEMAND_CONT , EXAM_CONT , SRCH_VAL , MAYOR_REPORT_YN , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_REPORT0D0 A WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
